chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 288 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1416/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.01.2025 Mr. Aneel Zia, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector, SAPT. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent 2, which is taken on record. It seems that this petition has been filed prematurely when admittedly petitioner has not exhausted recourse before the department. Per department’s counsel, the petitioner is required to make an application under Section 83-B of the Customs Acct, 1969 and he has not done so as yet. Department’s counsel further states that if any such application is filed the same shall be taken into consideration strictly in accordance with law. This being the situation and notwithstanding the fact that this is a premature petition, we deem it appropriate to dispose of this petition, however, petitioner may avail appropriate remedy identified above, which shall be taken into consideration in accordance with law. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
